Üsküdar University NP Health Campus is located in the very center of Ümraniye, one of the largest districts on the Anatolian side of Istanbul.

Located within the borders of Saray Neighborhood, NP Campus provides an important convenience in transportation with its location within walking distance to Üsküdar-Çekmeköy Metro.
